title: TNT Items Explode
description: This datapack/mod makes it so that TNT items explode after being dropped on the ground for 1 second!
body:
# TNT Items Explode

This is quite a simple data pack: it makes it so that TNT items dropped on the ground explode after 1 second (20 game ticks).

### Notes:
- The `tie_data` scoreboard tracks the amount of times that a tnt item is used to cause an explosion. You can use the command `/function tie:scoreboard_show` to see this data and the command `/function tie:scoreboard_hide` to hide it.
- TNT items are given immunity from explosions so that multiple tnt items can be used for explosions near each other in rapid succession. TNT itmes can recieve knockback from explosions, so watch out!

My [DataUtils](https://modrinth.com/datapack/data-utils) pack is required to be installed in order for this pack to function.

Check out [my other packs](https://modrinth.com/user/Baruch) for more!
